FedEx Stock Rallies On Better-Than-Expected Q2 EPS, Freight Spin-Off Announcement
data.description: FedEx reports its second-quarter results after Thursday's closing bell and announced the spin off of FedEx Freight.

data.title: BlackBerry Beats Q3 Earnings Estimates, But Soft Guidance Keeps Shares In Check
data.description: BlackBerry reports third-quarter revenue of $162 million. The company reports third-quarter adjusted earnings of 2 cents per share, beating analyst estimates for a loss of 1 cent per share, according to Benzinga Pro.
